title: Velvety Sour Flaxseed Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday Brazilian dish featuring sour flaxseed in a velvety sauce that pairs well with grilled vegetables or tofu.
instructions: Toast flaxseeds in a dry pan over medium heat until lightly golden, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
Finely chop garlic cloves, onions, green onions, and red bell peppers.
Blend cooled toasted flaxseeds with chopped garlic, onions, tomatoes (drained), and peppers into a smooth paste in a blender or food processor.
Add sour mix, water, and olive oil to the blended mixture. Blend again until completely smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasonings if needed.
Heat some olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Pour in the flaxseed sauce and bring it to simmering. Let cook for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened and fragrant.
Serve immediately with grilled vegetables or tofu on top of steamed rice or quinoa.
